name: alpha_001_quality_reversal
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(est_cashflow_op, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), rank(subtract(est_sales, sales))), add(rank(subtract(divide(cash, assets), divide(capex, assets))), multiply(-1, rank(ts_delta(close, 5)))))

name: alpha_002_profitability_reversal
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(cashflow_op, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), rank(subtract(est_eps, eps))), add(rank(divide(bookvalue_ps, close)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_mean(ts_delta(close, 1), 7)))))

name: alpha_003_margin_revision_rev
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(ebit, assets), divide(debt, assets))), rank(subtract(est_sales, sales))), add(rank(subtract(divide(cashflow_op, assets), divide(capex, assets))), multiply(-1, rank(ts_decay_linear(ts_delta(close, 1), 6)))))

name: alpha_004_defensive_quality
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(est_cashflow_op, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), rank(subtract(divide(cash, assets), divide(debt, assets)))), add(rank(subtract(est_fcf, capex)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_rank(close, 8)))))

name: alpha_005_analyst_quality_rev
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(earnings_certainty_rank_derivative, beta_last_60_days_spy)), rank(subtract(analyst_revision_rank_derivative, correlation_last_60_days_spy))), add(rank(subtract(divide(cashflow_op, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), multiply(-1, rank(ts_mean(ts_delta(close, 1), 10)))))

name: alpha_006_stable_quality_rev
expr: add(add(rank(subtract(divide(ebitda, assets), divide(capex, assets))), rank(subtract(est_cashflow_op, cashflow_op))), add(rank(subtract(divide(cash, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), multiply(-1, rank(ts_decay_exp_window(ts_delta(close, 1), 8)))))
